articles.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
articles.summary: BBVA has partnered with OpenAI to integrate artificial intelligence into its banking services, aiming to revolutionize the customer experience and improve operational efficiency. This collaboration is expected to enable BBVA to develop more personalized and automated banking solutions, setting a new standard for the global banking industry. By leveraging OpenAI's cutting-edge technology, BBVA is poised to drive innovation and stay ahead of the curve in the rapidly evolving fintech landscape.

articles.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
articles.summary: BNY Mellon has partnered with OpenAI to develop an "AI for everyone, everywhere" initiative, aiming to make artificial intelligence more accessible and inclusive. This collaboration will leverage OpenAI's technology to drive innovation and democratize access to AI capabilities. The partnership is expected to have a significant impact on the financial industry and beyond, enabling wider adoption of AI solutions.

articles.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
articles.summary: The developers of Sora utilized Codex, an AI-powered coding tool, to successfully launch the app on Android in just 28 days. Codex's automated coding capabilities significantly accelerated the development process, allowing the team to focus on fine-tuning the app's features and user experience. This achievement demonstrates the potential of AI-driven coding tools to rapidly deploy high-quality apps across multiple platforms.

articles.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a powerful AI model that can assist in advancing science and math by generating human-like text and solving complex problems. This innovation has the potential to accelerate breakthroughs in various fields, from physics and engineering to mathematics and computer science. With GPT-5.2, scientists can automate tedious tasks, explore new ideas, and make discoveries more efficiently.

articles.title: Update to GPT-5 System Card: GPT-5.2
articles.summary: The GPT-5 system has been updated to GPT-5.2, bringing enhancements to its already powerful language processing capabilities. This update is expected to improve the model's performance and accuracy in generating human-like text and responses. The GPT-5.2 update showcases the ongoing advancements in AI technology, further blurring the lines between human and machine-generated content.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Gemini has introduced enhanced audio models, enabling more powerful and immersive voice experiences. These upgraded models allow for better voice recognition, synthesis, and overall audio quality, paving the way for innovative voice-based applications. With this improvement, users can expect more natural and engaging interactions with voice-powered devices and services.

articles.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
articles.summary: A leading tech company is strengthening its partnership with the UK AI Security Institute to advance AI security research and development. This collaboration aims to drive innovation in AI-powered security solutions, enhancing protection against emerging threats. By combining expertise, they seek to create more robust and resilient security systems for the future.

articles.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
articles.summary: A leading tech company has announced a strengthened partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the age of artificial intelligence. This collaboration aims to harness AI's potential to drive economic growth and improve national security. By working together, they will develop innovative solutions to address key challenges and opportunities in the AI era.

articles.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced the FACTS Benchmark Suite, a comprehensive evaluation tool to assess the factuality of large language models, helping to identify and mitigate the spread of misinformation. This suite provides a systematic framework to test language models' ability to distinguish between factual and false information. By using FACTS, developers can refine their models to produce more accurate and trustworthy outputs.

articles.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
articles.summary: Scientists are developing more resilient crops to combat the challenges of a warming climate, using advanced engineering techniques to enhance their ability to withstand extreme temperatures and weather conditions. This innovative approach aims to improve crop yields and food security in the face of rising global temperatures. By engineering climate-resilient crops, researchers hope to mitigate the impacts of climate change on agriculture and ensure a more sustainable food supply.

articles.title: CUGA on Hugging Face: Democratizing Configurable AI Agents
articles.summary: Hugging Face has introduced CUGA, a platform that democratizes access to configurable AI agents, allowing users to easily create and customize their own AI models. This innovation enables developers to build tailored AI solutions without requiring extensive expertise, making AI more accessible and widespread. By lowering the barrier to entry, CUGA has the potential to accelerate AI adoption across various industries and applications.

articles.title: Nemotron 3 Nano \- A new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models
articles.summary: The Nemotron 3 Nano introduces a new standard for efficient, open, and intelligent agentic models, promising to revolutionize the field with its cutting-edge technology. This innovative model enables seamless interaction between humans and AI systems, fostering a more collaborative and adaptive environment. By setting a new benchmark for agentic models, Nemotron 3 Nano is poised to significantly impact the development of intelligent systems and AI applications.

articles.title: New in llama.cpp: Model Management
articles.summary: The latest update to llama.cpp introduces model management capabilities, allowing users to easily manage and switch between different AI models. This innovation enables more flexibility and customization, making it simpler to adapt the technology to various applications and use cases. By streamlining model management, llama.cpp enhances its usability and versatility for developers and users alike.

articles.title: Codex is Open Sourcing AI models
articles.summary: Codex, a leader in AI technology, is open-sourcing its AI models, making them freely available to the public and allowing developers to build upon and improve them. This move is expected to accelerate innovation in the field of artificial intelligence and drive new applications. By open-sourcing its models, Codex is democratizing access to AI and fostering a community-driven approach to AI development.

articles.title: Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker: Cost-efficient Frontier Multimodal Performance
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker, a cost-efficient AI model that achieves state-of-the-art performance in multimodal tasks, such as text, image, and audio processing. This innovation enables more efficient use of computational resources, making multimodal AI applications more accessible. By reducing costs, Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker has the potential to accelerate the development of AI-powered applications in various industries.

articles.title: Children with cancer scammed out of millions fundraised for their treatment
articles.summary: A devastating scam has targeted children with cancer, duping donors out of millions of dollars meant for their medical treatment. The scammers used fake social media profiles and crowdfunding campaigns to deceive well-meaning donors, highlighting the need for increased vigilance and verification in online fundraising. This heartless exploitation has significant financial and emotional consequences for the affected families.

articles.title: JetBlue flight averts mid-air collision with US Air Force jet
articles.summary: A JetBlue flight narrowly avoided a mid-air collision with a US Air Force jet after air traffic control alerted the pilots to the potential danger. The close call highlights the importance of effective communication and collision avoidance systems in preventing accidents. Fortunately, the incident ended without harm, thanks to the swift response of the JetBlue pilots and air traffic control.

articles.title: 8M users' AI conversations sold for profit by "privacy" extensions
articles.summary: A recent discovery revealed that certain browser extensions, marketed as privacy-focused, have been secretly collecting and selling conversations between 8 million users and AI chatbots for profit. This shocking breach of trust highlights the importance of scrutinizing the data collection practices of even seemingly secure extensions. The incident raises concerns about the exploitation of user data and the need for greater transparency in the extension ecosystem.

articles.title: Bonsai: A Voxel Engine, from scratch
articles.summary: Developers have created Bonsai, a voxel engine built from scratch, allowing for the creation of immersive 3D environments with blocky, pixelated graphics. This innovative engine has the potential to revolutionize game development and other interactive applications. By being open-source, Bonsai enables the community to contribute and shape the future of voxel-based technologies.

articles.title: Secret Documents Show Pepsi and Walmart Colluded to Raise Food Prices
articles.summary: Leaked documents have revealed a alleged collusion between Pepsi and Walmart to artificially inflate food prices, sparking concerns over anti-competitive practices. The secret documents suggest the two companies worked together to raise prices and limit competition, potentially harming consumers. This bombshell revelation could have significant implications for the food industry and antitrust regulations.
